---
title: "Antoine Tourret"
subtitle: "PhD Student<br>Aquatic Ecotoxicology"
image: inputs/photos/profile_pic/my_profile_pic.png
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 75%
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:antoinetourretpro@gmail.com"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Antoine-T17
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/antoine-tourret-b70672175/
    - icon: instagram
      text: "@antoine_cumulus"
      href: https://www.instagram.com/antoine_cumulus/
---

I am a PhD student at **Université Paris-Est Créteil**, within the **Laboratoire Eau Environnements et Systèmes Urbains (LEESU)**.

My research sits at the intersection of aquatic ecotoxicology and data science, using *Daphnia magna* as a biological model.

## Research

I am currently working on two projects:

**ANR AOP-NANOP** — This project aims to assess the ecotoxicity of model nanoplastics synthesised in the laboratory by the Institut des Sciences Analytiques et de Physico-Chimie pour l'Environnement et les Matériaux (IPREM) in Pau. The goal is to identify robust explanatory factors of nanoplastic toxicity on *Daphnia magna*.

**Recycled urban furniture** — This second project evaluates the toxicity of recycled plastic urban furniture, again using the water flea as a sentinel organism.

## Beyond the lab

I have a passion for clouds. Identifying their forms, watching them evolve and transform within minutes --- and capturing them at just the right moment before they vanish.

Find my photos on Instagram: [\@antoine_cumulus](https://www.instagram.com/antoine_cumulus/).

I also enjoy everything related to **data visualization** --- building clear, elegant, and reproducible reports with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/).

One last thing: I own more than thirty ties and wear them pratically everyday (except when the weather is too hot).
